_meta.author: Nael Karimou 5734316
_meta.description: This file contains the hints from the chief officer. SO far, it covers when an evidence is examined and when a room is unlocked.
_meta.todo: Check with data architect if formats get along

object_hint.case_file:
This is the document of the case your are working on.
Elena, married women with kids, prominent researcher
 and professor at the city university has been found dead
 in her office at XX:XX pm.
object_hint.draft_email:
A draft email to a lawyer: 'Regarding financial 
irregularities in Victor Osei's department...'
 She was about to report someone.
object_hint.tweed_thread:
The lamp is smashed. Wait — there's a small thread 
 caught on the broken edge. Looks like tweed.
object_hint.dinner_invitation:
A faculty dinner invitation for last night.
 We should check what time it actually ended.

room_unlocks_hint.victors_house:
Looks like you have unlocked Victors house!
 You can now interrogate him.
room_unlocks_hint.faculty_dining_hall:
Looks like you have unlocked the Faculty Dining hall!
 You might want to interrogate a waiter there.
room_unlocks_hint.lenas_house: Looks like you have unlocked Lena's Apartment! You can now interrogate her.
